title: searsia glutinosa subsp. glutinosa
intro: Searsia glutinosa subsp. glutinosa, also known as the Red Alder or Red Buffalo Berry, is a species of plant in the family Anacardiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Searsia glutinosa subsp. glutinosa include the potential treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use in traditional medicine to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Searsia glutinosa subsp. glutinosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and salves for topical application.
